notes: The inaugural season. CHC (Sean) takes the first Dynasty Bowl, defeating VAN in the championship. BKB wins the HCC; MTL (now SAR) claims the SCC. The league establishes its identity across two conferences rooted in a Toronto–Cleveland sports friendship.

BKB returns to the championship game for the second consecutive year, but it's WPG who upsets — still operating as the Winnipeg Wankers in their founding-era identity — claiming DBII over GLD. VAN bounces back from its DB I loss to win the SCC.

playoff_format: 7-team; SCC and HCC champions earn seeds 1-2; seeds 3-7 are at-large by record; 1-seed earns first-round bye
notes: The playoff format expands to 7 teams. BKB breaks through for their first championship, defeating TOR in the final. CHC makes a surprise HCC title run but can't replicate their 2021 championship. TOR wins the SCC for the first time.

playoff_format: 7-team; SCC and HCC champions earn seeds 1-2; seeds 3-7 are at-large by record; 1-seed earns first-round bye
notes: TOR wins back-to-back SCC titles and redeems their 2023 championship loss by defeating IQT in Dynasty Bowl IV. TOR becomes the first — and so far only — SCC franchise to win the Dynasty Bowl, snapping HCC's four-year dominance. IQT makes their first and only championship appearance to date.

playoff_format: 7-team; SCC and HCC champions earn seeds 1-2; seeds 3-7 are at-large by record; 1-seed earns first-round bye
notes: BKB claims their second championship in three years, defeating PEI — making their first Dynasty Bowl appearance — in DB V. TBY claims the SCC title for the first time under their Mustangs identity. The HCC reasserts its championship dominance with a 4-1 all-time edge.
